Synthesized from handbook_2026.pdf: Company IT Equipment Allowance Policy
Every full-time employee is entitled to a $1,500 annual hardware stipend for
purchasing laptops, monitors, and ergonomic accessories.
All purchases must be submitted through the procurement portal.

Synthesized from travel_policy_v2_2026.pdf: Revised Corporate Travel Guidelines (Version 2.0)
Effective Date: January 1, 2026
Note: This policy supersedes Version 1.0 (2024).
1. Hotel Accommodation: Due to increased hospitality costs, the maximum
allowable hotel accommodation expense is now $250 per night.
2. Meal Per Diem: International meal per diem is updated to $95 per day.
3. Flight Eligibility: Business class flights are permitted for any
international flight exceeding 8 hours.

Synthesized from remote_work_guidelines.pdf: Remote Work Guidelines and Ad-Hoc Arrangements
Employees may work remotely on ad-hoc days subject to manager discretion
and operational requirements. Approval processes and notification deadlines
vary by department, project phase, and team sprint schedule.

Remote Work Guidelines and Ad-Hoc Arrangements

and operational requirements. Approval processes and notification deadlines
vary by department, project phase, and team sprint schedule.
